puzzle.hint: A sense used to listen to the Quran.
puzzle.arabicVerse: قُلْ هُوَ ٱلَّذِىٓ أَنشَأَكُمْ وَجَعَلَ لَكُمُ ٱلسَّمْعَ وَٱلْأَبْصَـٰرَ وَٱلْأَفْـِٔدَةَ ۖ قَلِيلًۭا مَّا تَشْكُرُونَ
puzzle.verse: 67:23 — Say, "It is He who has produced you and made for you hearing and vision and hearts [i.e., intellect]; little are you grateful."
